refactorPlan.title: Fix AST deprecation in test_pipelines_ltx2_pose.py
refactorPlan.description: Replace all occurrences of `elt.s` with `elt.value` when accessing AST string constant nodes. The `.s` attribute on `ast.Constant` is deprecated since Python 3.12 and will be removed in Python 3.14, causing test failures on the next Python version upgrade.

refactorPlan.title: Document magic seed constant in ia2v.py
refactorPlan.description: Add an inline comment next to the fixed `seed=42` constant used in pass 2 of the ia2v pipeline, referencing the LTX 2.3 ia2v reference workflow as the source. Prevents future maintainers from assuming this is an arbitrary default.

refactorPlan.title: Declare controlnet_aux as [pose] optional extra
refactorPlan.description: Add a `[pose]` optional-dependencies group to pyproject.toml with `controlnet_aux>=0.0.20`. This makes the dependency for `dw_preprocessor` discoverable and installable, consistent with the existing `[cuda]`/`[cpu]` extras pattern.

refactorPlan.title: Group Lotus entries in depth.py manifest()
refactorPlan.description: Add grouping comments `# --- Lotus depth estimation ---` and `# --- LTX 2.0 video generation ---` inside manifest() to separate the two sets of model entries. Clarifies pipeline stage ownership and eases future refactoring of the Lotus pass.
